key.name: start-on-disks
key.description: Show the disk panel when Nautilus opens

key.name: custom-color
key.description: Hex color used when color-mode is flat

key.name: gradient-color-1
key.description: Left color (stop 20%) used when color-mode is gradient

key.name: gradient-color-2
key.description: Right color (stop 100%) used when color-mode is gradient

key.name: hide-system-partitions
key.description: Hide partitions like boot and EFI
